creator: wanglong@hbdcb.net.cn
text:
my computer is pentium 166 with ABUS T2P4d motherboard and my harddisk is seagate ST52520 .I installed  FreeBSD 2.2.1
in it good,but one day i find my first IDE controller was bad ,so i change my harddisk to the second  IDE controller ,but when i install 
freebsd in it,it can not boot now ,and the message is:" panic :...........can't
boot from root".
